faq.title: Questions?
faq.a1: theRec helps individuals and teams record their screen, explain ideas visually, share video updates, and collaborate asynchronously without unnecessary meetings.
faq.q2: Do I need to install any software?
faq.a2: No. theRec works directly in your browser, so you can start recording instantly without downloading or installing anything.
faq.q3: Can I share recordings with people outside my workspace?
faq.a3: Yes. You can generate secure public links for external sharing or keep videos private inside your workspace.
faq.q4: Is theRec suitable for remote teams?
faq.a4: Absolutely. theRec is built for async communication, making it ideal for remote teams, distributed companies, product demos, onboarding, and team updates.
faq.q5: How are videos processed after recording?
faq.a5: Videos are automatically processed in the background to generate optimized playback formats, thumbnails, and streaming-ready files.
faq.a6: Yes. In addition to screen recording, you can upload existing video files and organize them inside your workspace.
faq.a7: Yes. You control who can access recordings through workspace permissions and secure sharing settings.
faq.q8: Is there a free plan available?
faq.a8: Yes. You can start with a free plan and upgrade anytime when your team needs more storage, collaboration, and advanced features.

q1.a: theRec helps individuals and teams record their screen, explain ideas visually, share video updates, and collaborate asynchronously without unnecessary meetings.

q2.q: Do I need to install any software?
q2.a: No. theRec works directly in your browser, so you can start recording instantly without downloading or installing anything.

q3.q: Can I share recordings with people outside my workspace?
q3.a: Yes. You can generate secure public links for external sharing or keep videos private inside your workspace.

q4.q: Is theRec suitable for remote teams?
q4.a: Absolutely. theRec is built for async communication, making it ideal for remote teams, distributed companies, product demos, onboarding, and team updates.

q5.q: How are videos processed after recording?
q5.a: Videos are automatically processed in the background to generate optimized playback formats, thumbnails, and streaming-ready files.

q6.a: Yes. In addition to screen recording, you can upload existing video files and organize them inside your workspace.

q7.a: Yes. You control who can access recordings through workspace permissions and secure sharing settings.

q8.q: Is there a free plan available?
q8.a: Yes. You can start with a free plan and upgrade anytime when your team needs more storage, collaboration, and advanced features.
